text_block_list.name: Smartphone
text_block_list.text:
"Just as the buzz around the Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe has quieted
down, we received news that has sent us all into an uproar!"

text_block_list.name: Smartphone
text_block_list.text:
"We're here to report that one of the world's strongest racers will be
joining the Japan Cup! Her participation is causing quite the stir!"

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass! Nice to see you again!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Welcome home, El. I suppose our room will be much noisier going
forward.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Wow! Nice to hear those biting comments again too!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now I need to get used to Japan again, and fast! After all, I was away
for over half a year!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That's very true... There's the time difference, the food, and of course... studying. Returning to daily life is certain to be quite the challenge.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Aaaahhh! Studying is the one challenge I don't want to face!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Of course... you also need to reacquaint yourself with Japanese
racecourses. We still have our promise to keep, you know.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, originally you'd be racing against the world's strongest racer,
but... I guess there'll be a slight change of plans...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El... regardless of how you view that race, I still saw your Prix de l'Arc
de Triomphe as a magnificent race.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Even after running in such an important race, I still see you the same
way... You still encourage me to run as my rival... and my inspiration.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That alone has me excited for this year's Japan Cup. Naturally, it
serves as another stepping stone on my way to the top, but...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It is also a chance for your Japanese competitors to carve our names
in the hearts of people the world over.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... You better show 'em how it's done! Let them see how strong
my rivals are!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It hasn't been long since Special Week won the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've been hard at work preparing for the Japan Cup, but it seems
that race had a surprise in store for us.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text: "We will now move on to our interview with the racer herself."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey, it's starting!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: We hear you'll be heading to Japan soon. Please tell us about that!

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text: Yes, gladly.

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text:
I have participated in races the world over, and now, I have taken on
the pinnacle of racing and won.

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text:
However, that race also showed me that this world is still filled with
talented Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text:
And I must admit... my interest was piqued by these yet unknown
foes—by these racers running in Japan's Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa may have lit this fire in me, but I have heard much
about her contemporaries, Grass Wonder and Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text:
As they are both participating in the Japan Cup, I too shall be taking
on this challenge.

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text: <I hope you will look forward to it.>

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Who would've thought the Arc Umamusume would come here.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: She even mentioned Spe by name...

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
"Next up, we'll hear the fan reaction to the news of Montjeu's
participation."

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
"Her race with El Condor Pasa was totally intense! Seeing just how
strong our Japanese racers are really got my blood pumping!"

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
"Which made losing so much harder... But that's why I want our racers
to do their best in this next race!"

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
"Special Week, Grass Wonder... If you're watching, just know
everyone in Japan is rooting for you!

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
"As you can see, many fans are looking to get payback for the Prix de
l'Arc de Triomphe. They've thrown their support behind our Japanese
racers."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The racing fans of Japan all know Montjeu as the one who crushed El
Condor Pasa's dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the program regarding the Arc Umamusume continues, Special
Week simply watches on, her eyes never leaving the screen.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Looks like we've got more training to do.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Looks like we've got more training to do.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Japan grows more and more excited about the Japan Cup, we
receive news that stops us all in our tracks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grass Wonder has been forced to pull out of the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Can you believe the sun is already setting? Winter is just around the
corner.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Um... About the Japan Cup...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It seems I... went a little too far during training.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
With all of Japan watching, this race was bound to lead me to the
top. Not to mention, it was a chance to take on the one who beat El.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The racing fans of Japan want to see one of their racers win, and I
wanted so desperately to be the one representing them.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Of course, I also wanted to run with you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Me?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Your performance at the autumn Tenno Sho was simply amazing.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hearing we were both going to be in the Japan Cup, I was naturally
very excited. I couldn't wait... to run with you...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I really... wanted to run this race...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I promise, Grass...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm going to win.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I wanted to race you too.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I wanted to beat both Montjeu and you. I lost our last race, after all.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So I swear I'll win. I'll prove that I, Special Week, am Japan's strongest
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And then, I'll be waiting for you at the Arima Kinen... as the best racer
in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Spe...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, in that case, I should recover quickly so I can appropriately
prepare for our race.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Please do your best in the Japan Cup. I want you to show them just
how strong the Umamusume of Japan are.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Show them how it's done, Ruler of Japan.
